Success.Hub: %v <green>You have been teleported to the HUB.</green>
Success.Link: %v <green>Your code is %v. It will expire after 5 minutes!</green>
Success.Warp: %v <green>You have warped all the players to your game</green>
Success.DuelRequestReceived: %v <green>You received a duel request from </green>%v<green>. Type '/duel accept %v' to accept!</green>
Success.NoDuelRequest: <red>This player does not have any duel requests for you.</red>
Success.ELOClaim: %v <green>You successfully claimed 250 ELO! Wait until next season to use this command again.</green>
Success.BanDisconnect:
<red>You are %v banned%v from this server!</red>

<grey>Reason: <white>%v</white></grey>
<grey>Find out more: <aqua>https://discord.gg/sFUV2rBhbD</aqua></grey>
<grey>Banned Since: <white>%v</white></grey>
Success.Muted:
<red>You are %v muted for %v!</red>
<grey>Reason: <white>%v</white></grey>
<grey>If you believe this was a mistake, please join our Discord server: <aqua>https://discord.gg/sFUV2rBhbD</aqua></grey>
Success.ResetStatsDisconnect: <dark-red>Your stats have been reset! Open a support ticket if this was a mistake..</dark-red>

Error.OnlyOneTarget: <red>You can only choose one player at a time.</red>
Error.PlayerNotExist: <red>Player does not exist! Make sure you spelt it correctly and is case sensitive.</red>
Error.NoGameToJoin: <red>You are currently not in a game.</red>
Error.LobbyOnly: <red>You can only execute this command in the lobby.</red>
Error.TargetLobbyOnly: <red>This player is in a game. Please wait until they finish their game!</red>
Error.MustBeInGame: <red>The player must be in a game for this command to work.</red>
Error.AlreadyHaveDuelRequest: <red>You already sent a duel request to a player. Do '/duel cancel' to cancel that request, so that you can send a duel request to another player!</red>
Error.NicknameLength: <red>Nickname must be between 2 and 20 characters long.</red>
Error.NicknameSpace: <red>Nickname cannot start or end with a space.</red>
Error.NicknameSpecialChars: <red>Nickname can only contain letters, numbers, and spaces.</red>
Error.NicknameMultipleSpaces: <red>Nickname cannot contain multiple spaces in a row.</red>
Error.NicknameUserNameAlreadyExists: <red>You cannot use that nickname as a player already has it as their gamertag.</red>
Error.ELOAlreadyClaimed: <red>You already claimed your 250 ELO this season. Please be patient until next season.</red>
Error.RankHierarchy: <red>This player holds a higher rank than you.</red>
Error.CapeAlreadyOwned: <red>This player already owns the specified cape.</red>
Error.CapeNotOwned: <red>This player doesn't own the specified cape in the first place.</red>

                                          <bold>Bed Wars</bold>

             <bold><yellow>Protect your bed and destroy the enemy beds.</yellow></bold>
             <bold><yellow>Upgrade yourself and your team by collecting.</yellow></bold>

                       <bold><yellow>to access powerful upgrades.</yellow></bold>

<green>============================================================</green>
BedWars.MagicMilkEffectGive: <green>You will not trigger any enemy traps for 30 seconds!</green>
BedWars.MagicMilkEffectRemove: <red>The magic milk effect is gone now. You will trigger enemy traps now!</red>

Error.CannotBreakMap: <red>You can only break the blocks players placed!</red>
